latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all shipping through Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars: 'I told him don't do that'
latest_news.text: Trump confirms he neither agreed with nor approved Israel's South Pars strike. 'We get along great. It's coordinated, but on occasion he'll do something.' Daylight between the two leaders visible for first time.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 Hour 06 auto — % (stable). Ground invasion ongoing past Litani. 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Bridges destroyed. No ceasefire signals. Updated 2026-03-20T06:01:31Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 06. Netanyahu says Israel will help US reopen Hormuz — first positive Hormuz signal from Israel. Trump halts Israeli energy strikes. Oil dropped from $119 to $108 on Hormuz reopening news. BUT: Iran MPs propose Hormuz tolls legislation, blockade continues. War rhetoric persists. Russia-Ukraine: attacks dropped 85% (50+/day → 7-10/day) but peace talks paused. Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu says Israel will help US reopen Strait of Hormuz; oil drops from $119 to $108
latest_news.text: Netanyahu says Israel will help US reopen Strait of Hormuz. Brent crude reversed from $119 intraday high to settle at $108.65. Netanyahu also says Iran 'can no longer enrich uranium or build ballistic missiles' and war 'may end sooner than people think.'

latest_news.headline: Trump tells Israel not to repeat strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure
latest_news.text: Trump confirms he told Netanyahu to halt further Israeli strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure. Political vulnerability to rising fuel prices driving policy shift. 'We get along great' but 'on occasion he'll do something.'

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russian attacks in Ukraine dropped from 50+/day to 7-10/day
latest_news.text: Ukrainian servicemember reports Russian attacks decreased from 50+ per day before January 2026 to 7-10 per day in February-March 2026. Poor winter weather and Russian force accumulation likely causes.

latest_news.headline: Kim Jong Un inspects new battle tanks in 'war preparation' drill with daughter
latest_news.text: Kim Jong Un oversaw combined infantry-tank drill at Pyongyang Training Base. Inspected 'incomparably superior' new main battle tank. Daughter drove tank. Drone attack simulations observed. Standard military posturing.

latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose legislation for tolls/taxes on all Strait of Hormuz shipping
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on all ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 06:00 UTC) — Netanyahu commits Israel to reopening Hormuz (first positive signal); oil drops from $119 to $108. Trump halts Israeli energy strikes. Iran MPs push Hormuz tolls legislation. Death toll: 1,444 Iran, 18 Israel, 13 US, 21 Gulf. Russia-Ukraine: attacks dropped 85% but peace talks paused. DPRK: Kim tank drills (standard). China: US intel says no 2027 invasion planned. Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. No new conflict zones.
